channel.title: 🤖 AI Hub on A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Recent content in 🤖 AI Hub on A Guide to Cloud & AI

item.title: What's New in M365 Copilot — March 2026
item.description: Stay up to date with the latest features and updates in Microsoft 365 Copilot for March 2026. This monthly roundup covers everything new — from agent improvements to UI changes.

item.title: What's New in M365 Copilot — Feb 2026
item.description: Monthly roundup of everything new in Microsoft 365 Copilot for February 2026.

item.title: Free Enterprise Copilot Chat Deep Dive
item.description: In this Free Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat Masterclass, I walk you through 18 powerful features available in Copilot Chat for Enterprise, and show how you can use them securely and effectively in real workplace scenarios.

item.title: Copilot Studio Beginner Lab — Part 1
item.description: Get started with Microsoft Copilot Studio in this step-by-step beginner lab. You’ll learn how to create your first AI agent, explore different types of topics, and deploy your agent to a demo site for live testing—all without writing code.

item.title: Researcher Agent Explained
item.description: Explore the Researcher Agent’s full power in M365. Learn how to summarize, generate, and research efficiently with AI — step-by-step for all levels.

item.title: Prompt Engineering Basics — Part 1
item.description: Explore prompt engineering using a cute and engaging visual approach! In this tutorial, we use a Cavalier King Charles Spaniel to illustrate the building blocks of powerful AI prompts — ideal for beginners and educators alike. 🐶

item.title: Microsoft 365 Agent Builder — Build 8 AI Agents
item.description: Build 8 unique AI agents in Microsoft 365 Copilot Agent Builder. A beginner-friendly, hands-on tutorial to master agent types, capabilities, and deployment.
